name: Tangy Summer Blend Smoothie
recipeIngredient: 6 oz. light (reduced sugar) fat-free peach, frozen
1/2 cup Crystal Light or other sugar-free lemonade
1 packet Equal sweetener or 2 teaspoons of sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to the blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
This Tangy Summer Blend Smoothie is a refreshing, low-calorie drink perfect for hot summer days. Enjoy!
